title: NHKマイルCの後に・急旋回！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa finishes the race with incredible
results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows no signs of fatigue, so I recommend
that she run in the Japanese Derby next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally blessed with an opportunity to race
against her classmates, El Condor Pasa is more
energetic than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it seems the feeling is mutual for Special
Week. Both of them face the coming race with
hearts ablaze.
